name: March Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork chops in a baking dish.
2. In a bowl, mix all other ingredients and stir thoroughly.
3. Pour the mixture over the pork chops.
4. Bake at 450°F for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the chops are beginning to brown. Turn the pork chops once during baking.
5. Excellent served with mashed potatoes made with garlic and chevril stirred into them. The leftover broth makes a wonderful light gravy.
Crockpot: Mix all ingredients except mushrooms in a crockpot. Cook for 4 hours on high. Add mushrooms and cook an additional hour.
